subject: Fw: 1055 Park Avenue
body:
Dear Jeffrey,
Here is more info about the development which I told U about. 

In email bellow there R more info about the development, but as I said it can be done to buyers likening as a private residence.

It is 84 milion without filishing or 92 milion with finishing.

Unfortunately there is very short window to cutch this opportunity. If U find it interesting, we can set up a meeting.

Thank U so much 
And mainly....beion all....thank U so so much for such an amazing talk!!!

Let us light up your life!
Lots of love, light, and happiness,
Petra

Petra Nemcova
Partner

Aglow Properties
160 Riverside Blvd. #509
New York, NY 10069
646.761.4337

PNemcova@AglowProperties.com


-----Original Message-----
From: "Ron Schnackenberg" <RSchnack@AglowProperties.com>

Date: Wed, 19 Dec 2007 09:10:21 
To:<PNemcova@AglowProperties.com>
Cc:<onemcova@AglowProperties.com>
Subject: 1055 Park Avenue


Petra, 
  
I wanted to give you a description of the property I discussed yesterday with the owners representing Broker. This information is highly confidential and neither us the owner or the broker can have this information get out. 
  
Description: 
  
1055 Park Avenue is currently the last developable corner property on Park Avenue south of 96th Street and north of 59th street. There is the option of build-to-suit as well as fully designed residences. 
  
1055 Park Avenue is new, modern, full floor living on Park Avenue—one of the best addresses money can buy in Manhattan. The location on Park Avenue and 87th is at the heart of the Upper East Side with access to the amenities that provide the finest lifestyle imaginable. From world class museums, picturesque Central Park, stately townhouse lined streets, shopping on Madison and Fifth Avenues, dining at tip New York City restaurants and the most prestigious schools, a residence on Park Avenue puts you in the center of it all. 
  
The intimate nature of 1055 Park Avenue with only 8 NEW residences is highly desirable. The attended lobby clad in rich leather and stone surfaces immediately welcomes you and transports you away from the hustle and bustle of the busy city. Enjoy a book from the common library or sit down for a drink with a neighbor at the bar. The building also offers a gem-like fitness facility shared with so few it will feel like your very own. A live-in super further adds to the high level of service that residents of Park Avenue have come to expect. 
  
The Pre-developed outline is as follows: 
  
Number of Stories: 12 plus cellar level 
Number of residences: 8 plus 1 Super’s home 
  
Residences: 
  
 
(1)                                 Unit 
(1)      No. Bed-rooms 
(1)      No. Baths

Approx. Exterior Square Footage

Price: $84,000,000 Raw Space, $92,000,000 Finished. All Cash 
  
Finishes: 
Lobby- 
·         Filled and Honed Travertine 
·         White Marble 
·         Pearl Wood 
·         Maple Wood 
·         Aniline Antique Leather 
  
Fitness Center- 
·         TBD 
  
General Residences- 
·         3 Interior finish package options 
  
Appliances/Fixtures- 
·         Viking Cooktop and hood 
·         Miele oven 
·         Viking refrigerator 
·         Miele dishwasher 
·         Miele Washer and Dryer 
·         Kohler Tea for Two tub 
·         Toto toilet 
·         Kohler sink and faucets 
  
Remember; this is the planned layout; the building can be built-to-suit as well meaning it can be designed and organized however the owner would prefer. This is an amazing opportunity for not only someone that would want this as their residence but for an investor as well. No outside broker knows about this, if we do not provide a buyer the opportunity will be released to the open broker market with price increases. The seller wants this closed as soon as possible.  Let me know if you have any questions. 
  
Ron Schnackenberg 
Partner/Licensed Real Estate Broker 
  
AGLOW PROPERTIES 
160 Riverside Blvd. #509 
New York, NY 10069 
646.761.4337 
 <mailto:RSchnack@AglowProperties.com> RSchnack@AglowProperties.com
